name: Zakuro
message: "I know I'm an eyesore... I'll try not to draw attention to myself, so..."

name: Megu
message: "What's with her? Is she acting like she's broken?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah... I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I won't do anything..."

name: Satoko
message: "But... couldn't this get us in trouble?"

name: Satoko
message: "Just look at her... This could be bad."

name: Satoko
message: "If anyone finds out about yesterday... That was totally a crime."

name: Megu
message: "What are you talking about? We didn't do anything. Tsubasa and those idiots did it all. Besides, you saw her, that was totally consensual."

name: Satoko
message: "...Yeah, it looked like she was enjoying it, but it might be a problem if someone finds out we drugged her, don't you think?"

name: Megu
message: "It'll be fine. She came to school and everything."

name: Satoko
message: "I guess so, but... she always comes to school, even if she's sick. Maybe her parents are real tightwads?"

name: Megu
message: "Then her parents probably just think she caught a cold or something, you know?"

name: Megu
message: "Yeah, let's leave it up to her parents. I'm sure she'll be fine tomorrow. People are surprisingly resilient, after all."

name: Megu
message: "Yeah, sometimes I get like crazy depressed. It just hits me like a brick and I can't do shit. Just makes me want to off myself or something."

name: Megu
message: "But after a few days, I get over it."

name: Satoko
message: "She'll be fine if she just hangs out with her friends for a few days."

name: Megu
message: "Yeah. My first time was with some random guy I didn't know too, but I'm still alive."

name: Satoko
message: "Yeah, I heard you got fucked by some of the guys in your club, right?"

name: Megu
message: "Yeah, a whole bunch of them all at once, and I was still a virgin, too."

name: Zakuro
message: "I won't ask for anything again... I won't dream anymore..."
I'm worthless now that I'm not a virgin, right?
I'm just a filthy bug... A pile of shit...
I'm nothing more than a moist hole. I should've known I was going to get raped...
Mamiya-kun will never want to touch me now...
I'm just here to be raped.
I might as well go satisfy some other guy's sexual desires.
I might as well rot and die.
So maggots can eat my flesh.
So I can rot and disappear.
Your life has no value. Go die.

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm sorry, I'm sorry... I don't want to die, I don't want to die, I don't want to die..."
Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die Die

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't want to die... Why me?"

Because you're a worm, because you're a moist hole, because you're an ugly bitch, because you're a worm, because you're a moist hole, because you're an ugly bitch, because you're a worm, because you're a moist hole, because you're an ugly bitch.

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm human... I'm human... I'm human I'm human I'm human I'm human I'm human I'm I'm I'm I'm..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm sorry... I'm sorry... I... I'm sorry... I, I, I..."

name: God
message: "Jesus fucking christ, what's stinking this place up?"

name: God
message: "I can answer your questions, doubts, Copernicuses."

name: Zakuro
message: "I won't... I won't ask you for anything ever again... I, I..."

name: God
message: "Oh, really? So you're done coveting your neighbors, then?!"

name: God
message: "Then would you stop breathing in all my damn air?

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't want to die. I don't want to die... I don't want to die... I won't ask you for anything else. I don't want to die..."

name: God
message: "What's wrong, Takashima Zakuro-chan? If you keep crying, something might pop out and GET YOU! WHEELCHAIR! RELIGIOUS REVOLUTION!"

name: God
message: "If you pay me 30 yen, I'll save your soul."

name: God
message: "Sow you want me to shave your soul?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I didn't sell it... I didn't sell my body... I..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's not true... That's not true... I, I... That's not true..."

name: God
message: "I would totally make a new pedigree with you."

name: God
message: "And by that I mean I'd have sex with you!"

name: God
message: "And sex is a metaphor for me fucking you!"

name: God
message: "Fuck! Come on, you love to get down, right? You're a dirty girl, love to shaaaagggg! Scream for me, tell me you want your little cunt filled!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't... I hate that stuff... I don't want any of that..."

name: God
message: "But you wanted to fuck Mamiya-kun, didn't you?"

name: God
message: "He got your pussy nice and wet, didn't he?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's not true! I just liked Mamiya-kun, that's all. I, I―"

name: God
message: "It'll all be okay. I know you're a pure girl at heart."

name: God
message: "I know everything. For instance, I know that your cunt smells like rotten fish right now."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's awful... Don't say that... I can't take it..."

name: God
message: "Don't worry about it. I mean, anyone's cunt would smell after that."

name: God
message: "Of course it smells. You had like ten guys put their dicks in you last night! It's probably the nastiest cunt in all of creation!"

name: God
message: "You were a pure girl with a cunt that didn't smell until last night. Your cunt is probably going to reek for the rest of your life now, though."

name: God
message: "It's a new show, airing at 11! Takashima Zakurero, the girl with a smelly cunt!"
So now I... I can't... I can't...

name: God
message: "There's an infinite array of possibilities laid out before you."

name: God
message: "There are unlimited possibilities within your grasp!"
It felt like my head was going to split open.
It's because I didn't get any sleep... Because I didn't get any sleep... Because I didn't get any sleep... That's why this is happening...
It's not like I'm going crazy or anything.
My head... My head... My head...

name: God
message: "30 yen for head! 30,000 yen for the body! That's just common sense for a whore!"

name: God
message: "The cost of living is too high! Who the heck is running this place?"

name: God
message: "But your body only costs as much as a room at the love hotel! So cheap! Better buy now before it's gone!"

name: God
message: "Why don't you try saying it? It's wool."

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't love to fuck... I don't love to fuck... I don't love to fuck..."

name: God
message: "All the cool kids call it the bedtop sport for indoor types. I'll have to write that one down, GYAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA."

name: God
message: "The sky's so far up! Smoking is so much fun! The special express is a NO SMOKING ZONE!"
I ran over to the other rooftop.
Mamiya-kun looked up at me with a kind smile.

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm Takashima Zakuro! I love you, Mamiya-kun!"

name: Mamiya
message: "But you're not a virgin, are you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Someone needs to take out the trash."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, that book I lent you stinks to high heaven. Stinky, stinky, stinky, stinky, stinky. It smells like whore."

name: Zakuro
message: "N-No, I bathed over and over last night. Mamiya-kun... I washed and washed."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then I guess it was worth lending it to you, huh?"

name: God
message: "You think you're special cuz you read Cyrano de Bergerac?! I bet you spend all day reading porn on your cellphone!"

name: God
message: "I bet Cyrano's smooth, flowing prose gets you wet like a Catholic schoolgirl!"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's not true... That's not true... I'm... I'm not..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's a lie, that's a lie, that's a lie... Don't say that, don't say that, don't say that..."
"So lend your good ol' friend a few bucks."
"B-But I just gave you some money yesterday..."
"He was almost there, didn't you see it? Then he fell from his fucking horse. That race was totally fixed. Don't you think so?"
"He would've won if they hadn't fixed the race... So gimme some more."
There was no way for him to rebuff the bully.
"Your buddy is having some financial trouble... You can help me out, right?"
"I'll give it back once I win... Haven't you heard about this baby? I bought this Rolex with my winnings last time."
"You've, uh... been saying you were gonna pay me back for a while now."
"Shut up and give me the money already."
"Um... Wouldn't that girl have money too? I think her name was Takashima Zakuro?"
"She's only good for fucking. It's your job to pay up. You're my wallet."
This is how they treat the one person I really like.
The fake one was the cool, smart Mamiya-kun.
I couldn't make that Mamiya-kun into the real one.
Just like that, weak people live their entire lives being stepped on by the strong.
"Wouldn't it be easier if you just jumped?"
"It's right in front of you. If you just open your eyes, you'll understand..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't care... do whatever you want..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Have I been... dreaming this whole time?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That's it... That was all a dream... It must have been."

name: Ayana
message: "You don't need to listen to that... It has no power."

name: God
message: "I have way too much power. I am God."

name: Ayana
message: "It can't do anything, so it crawls inside people's hearts like that. It's completely powerless."

name: Zakuro
message: "What is this? Am I insane? Why is he so big? He's taller than a skyscraper! How is that possible?"

name: Ayana
message: "Who knows? I'm not a doctor, so how would I know?"

name: Zakuro
message: "But... You can see him too, right?"

name: Ayana
message: "1... Neither you nor I is insane."

name: Ayana
message: "2... You and I are both insane..."

name: God
message: "Yeah, just stick it in! Zakuro Cutter!"

name: God
message: "Oh, it's in your pocket, by the way."
When I searched my pockets, I found a box cutter.

name: God
message: "That's right! The infamous Zakuro Cutter can even cut through paper! What an amazing weapon! Good luck!"

name: Ayana
message: "You can't kill someone with a box cutter."

name: God
message: "Aim for the eyes! That's the weak spot!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Why does this only happen to me?! Why?! Why?!"

name: God
message: "Extract the information from her with your Zakuro Ear!"
You've probably suffered for a long time.
But the only reason you're suffering is because your existence is correct.
But the incorrect person who is tormenting you will die.
Soon, one of your problems will disappear.

name: God
message: "You won't die because you're the one who's correct!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Akasaka and Kitami... and Kimika... and Mamiya-kun, too..."

name: Zakuro
message: "And you, Otonashi Ayana! Are you here to torment me too?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Just talking to you... makes me feel like I'm going insane."

name: Ayana
message: "But you've been like that since before you met me."

name: Ayana
message: "Didn't it all start when you got raped by those men?"

name: Ayana
message: "Spread out on the bed like a sex doll... They could do whatever they wanted..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right... I was raped... by those men, by those men... I, I, I..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Defiled, defiled, defiled, defiled, defiled, defiled... defiled, defiled..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Filthy, filthy, filthy, filthy, filthy, filthy, filthy..."

name: God
message: "Take a good look out the window."
A great, black shadow... covering the sky...
A silhouette fell from the sky.
A silhouette, shaped like a human, fell from the sky, just like that.
He must have literally been full of shit.
That was what it sounded like.

name: Zakuro
message: "Someone fell from the sky... and died."

name: Zakuro
message: "Fell from the sky... and splattered on the ground..."

name: Zakuro
message: "They love the smell of rotting flesh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "They're all insane... They're all so filthy... They all look like worms..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's why... they're all having so much fun..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Because they're the cockroaches... that are tormenting me..."

name: Zakuro
message: "He was one of the people who raped me, after all."

name: Zakuro
message: "He was one of the people who trampled me underfoot."

name: Zakuro
message: "He's a cockroach... He couldn't forgive me for being better than him..."

name: Zakuro
message: "The ones that were with him... What about that guy called Numada? And of course, Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Smear your brains across the sidewalk... Break every bone in your body... Not like it'll be a big loss. All you fuckers have are cockroach brains, after all."

name: Zakuro
message: "We don't need you... You just stink."
'One of your problems will disappear tomorrow.'
He was one of my problems...
I have more than one problem...
I have far more than that.
Far more people... have to die.
Far more worms have to be crushed.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah... I have to send her a response."

name: Zakuro
message: "Um... Oh, here it is. Usami-san's message..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you very much... Thanks to you, one of my problems has been solved."

name: Zakuro
message: "But I still have many more problems. Will they be solved too?"

name: Zakuro
message: "If they aren't solved, I might just go crazy."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? What are you talking about? Now you're telling me I'm wrong too..."

name: Ayana
message: "Shiroyama-kun's death isn't what you think it is."

name: Ayana
message: "Numada-kun and Shiroyama-kun always do chin-ups on the roof."

name: Zakuro
message: "So then... what do you think I believe about his death?"

name: Ayana
message: "That was just an accident. It would be better if you just believed it was an accident."

name: Zakuro
message: "Is there such a thing as just an accident? Can't you come up with plenty of reasons leading to any accident?"

name: Ayana
message: "If you don't stop here... everything will begin to move."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes... Your choice will affect the fate of many other people."

name: Zakuro
message: "So I really can influence people's fates..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's it. It must be because I'm different from these cockroaches."
In a world of cockroaches, only I am human.
I quickly pulled out my phone.
Usami had already replied to my message.

name: Zakuro
message: "Um... Oh, it really is from Usami..."
Then I skimmed over the rest of the message.
I have to... meet my allies...
So that I can learn the true reason behind my mistake.
